title: Wake Island
writer: W.R. Burnett, Frank Butler, Lawrence Hazard
actors: Brian Donlevy, Robert Preston, Macdonald Carey
plot: December, 1941. With no hope of relief or re-supply, a small band of United States Marines tries to keep the Japanese Navy from capturing their island base.
awards: Nominated for 4 Oscars. 2 wins & 6 nominations total
